Option 01 · Arossim, South Goa

Arossim Village, South Goa

Tucked between sleepy villages and the Arabian Sea, this exceptional parcel sits in Arossim — one of South Goa's most quietly prestigious addresses. Less than two minutes on foot to the beach, surrounded by luxury resorts, and positioned in the Old Settlement Zone for remarkable development flexibility.

Location Advantages

  • Arossim Beach — less than a 2-minute walk
  • ITC Grand Goa Resort & Spa in the vicinity
  • Royal Orchid Beach Resort & Spa nearby
  • Premium dining at Bonita and ITC's signature restaurants
  • South Goa's pristine belt: Arossim, Utorda & Cansaulim beaches
  • Notable coastal neighbourhood — premium residential address

Connectivity & Development

  • Margao ~15 minutes
  • Panaji ~30 minutes
  • Ideal for luxury villa project, boutique resort, or premium bungalow
  • Old Settlement Zone permits residential & commercial use
  • Mundkar settlement accounted for — clean net area
  • 3m access road to rear property already allocated
02

Option 02 · Varca, South Goa

Varca Village, South Goa

A prime 3,500 sq.m canvas in Varca, one of South Goa's most serene and celebrated coastal villages. Fully compounded, out of CRZ, with a clear title — this is the kind of land that comes to market rarely. Walking distance to the beach, with all the infrastructure in place to build immediately.
